modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Laptop requirements for Nursing program needed.

full_description_text: I need to know what kind of laptop I should have. I'm in the Nursing program. Are there specific requirements for Windows or Mac? I want to make sure I have the right one.
short_description: Laptop requirements for Nursing program needed.
description: I need to know what kind of laptop I should have. I'm in the Nursing program. Are there specific requirements for Windows or Mac? I want to make sure I have the right one.
